title: AWS Lambda handlers should clean up temporary files in tmp directory
description: Ensure Lambda functions clean up temporary files in the tmp directory
message: Lambda function does not clean up temporary files in the tmp directory
impact: Function resource usage may grow over time
recommendation: Implement a cleanup function to remove temporary files

noncompliant.code:
import tempfile

tmp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False)
tmp_file.write(b'some data')
noncompliant.description: A Lambda function creates a temporary file and does not delete it

compliant.code:
import tempfile

tmp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=True)
tmp_file.write(b'some data')
compliant.description: A Lambda function creates a temporary file and deletes it after use

why_is_this_an_issue: Function resource usage may grow over time, leading to increased costs and potential performance issues
how_to_fix: Modify the Lambda function to include a cleanup function that removes temporary files
